/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wno-deprecated-declarations -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/mav_visualizer.dir/mav_visualizer_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mav_visualizer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mav_visualizer.dir/src/common/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mav_visualizer.dir/src/transport/udp_transport.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mav_visualizer.dir/src/parser/mavlink_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mav_visualizer.dir/src/model/telemetry_model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mav_visualizer.dir/src/history/history_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mav_visualizer.dir/src/ui/main_window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mav_visualizer.dir/src/ui/chart_widget.cpp.o -o mav_visualizer  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Charts.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGLWidgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2
